Petition For Instructions Regarding Partial Allowance And Partial Rejection Of Creditor?S Claims Filed By Elizabeth Bryant Stewart And David C. Stewart
Off Calendar Aug-29-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marta Eisenberg appeared by zoom for Heather Yarbrough (administrator).
Franchesca Callejo (guardian ad litem) appeared by zoom for the two minor beneficiaries.
Elizabeth Stewart (creditor) appeared by zoom in propria persona.
David Stewart (creditor) appeared by zoom in propria persona.

The court stated that it reviewed the materials and that it sees that there are substantial disputes. Mrs. Eisenberg stated that she put forward the recommendation from the guardian ad litem, and that she is ready to defer to the court for its consideration and decision on this. Mrs. Stewart stated that she would like to be reimbursed for the full amount that she paid to the lawyer, that she advanced $127,000.00 and that when her aunt was still alive, they were trying to secure her aunt's safety. Mrs. Stewart also stated that she is very confused with the system in San Francisco, that she did what she was being told to do by the lawyer, that she paid the bill for the lawyer and that she got no results. Mr. Stewart stated that they did the best they could to take care of their aunt and pay her rent. Mrs. Callejo stated that she was very disturbed with what Mrs. Stewart's attorneys charged, that her criticism isn't of Mrs. Stewart, but it is of the attorneys and what they were paid, and that the expenses for the settlor are clearly reimbursable. The Petition for Instructions Regarding Partial Allowance and Partial Rejection of Creditor's Claims is under submission.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions Regarding Partial Allowance And Partial Rejection Of Creditor?S Claims Filed By Elizabeth Bryant Stewart And David C. Stewart

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-18-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marta Eisenberg appearing via zoom for and with Heather Yarbrough (petitioner).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The lost will dated August 04, 2021 is admitted to probate. Heather Yarbrough is appointed as the Administrator with will annexed of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for August 20, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Amy Harrington is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.
